decision: Install a stdlib static-analysis/complexity quality gate with positive and negative fixtures; do not require external packages in the sandbox baseline.
synthesis: Static analysis should be an acceptance gate, not a style suggestion.
Complexity thresholds must be risk-tiered and overrideable only through explicit CDR waiver evidence.

CDR should check parseability, forbidden dynamic execution, unsafe path patterns, broad exception handling, naming ambiguity, TODO debt, function size, cyclomatic/cognitive complexity, and nesting depth.
Quality gates should emit exact violations so code is debuggable and recursively improvable.
